title: Optimized Vanilla-ish
description: A collection of optimization, appearance and quality of life client mods.
body:
A modpack with focus on trying to be as vanilla as possible.
With the use of many mods, I try to improve performance, experience and quality of life. You should be able to join any fully vanilla server, but always verify it first.


<details>
  <summary>Core Mods</summary>
  
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) - Needed by most mods.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) - Better rendering engine.
- [Cloth Config API](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config) - Needed by several mods.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) - A Mod Menu.
- [YACL](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl) - Configuration library.
- [YOSBR](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) - Configuration thingy.
- [ETF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures) - Optifine texture compatibility.
- [EMF](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features) - Optifine model compatibility.

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Optimization</summary>

- [Better Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-beds) - Optimized beds.
- [Chunky](https://modrinth.com/plugin/chunky) - Pre-generate chunks.
- [Distant Horizons](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons) - Look very far.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) - Reduce FPS on idle.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) - Adds culling to entities.
- [Enhanced Block Entities](https://modrinth.com/mod/ebe) - Improves performance of block entities.
- [More Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/moreculling) - Even more culling.
- [Fast IP Ping](https://modrinth.com/mod/fast-ip-ping) - Fast IP Ping
- [Ferrite Core](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) - Memory usage optimization.
- [Immediately Fast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) - Optimized rendering mode.
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium) - Server side optimizations.
- [Noisium](https://modrinth.com/mod/noisium) - Optimized World Gen
  
</details>


<details>
  <summary>Quality of Life</summary>

- [AppleSkin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) - Food HUD.
- [Better Command Block UI](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettercommandblockui)
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats) - Better stats.
- [Better Mount HUD](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-mount-hud) - A Mount HUD.
- [Better Ping Display](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-ping-display-fabric) - Ping with numbers.
- [Better Tab](https://modrinth.com/mod/bettertab) - Better player list.
- [Better F3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3)
- [Boat Item View](https://modrinth.com/mod/boat-item-view) - Improved item visibility on boats.
- [Clear Despawn Reworked](https://modrinth.com/mod/clear-despawn-reworked) - Items blink near despawn.
- [Durability Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/durability-tooltip) - Items show durability.
- [Fishing Ruler](https://modrinth.com/mod/fishing-ruler) - Adds a HUD ruler.
- [Freecam](https://modrinth.com/mod/freecam) - Detachable camera.
- [Health Indicator TXF](https://modrinth.com/mod/health-indicator-txf) - Customizable health indicator.
- [Now Playing](https://modrinth.com/mod/now-playing) - Popup music.
- [Screencopy](https://modrinth.com/mod/screencopy) - Screenshots go to clipboard.
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip) - Shulker Box helper HUD.
- [Status Effect Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/status-effect-bars) - Adds potion effect bars.
- [Where Did I Die](https://modrinth.com/mod/where-did-i-die) - Screenshots when you die.

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Loox</summary>

- [Visual Snowy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/visual-snowy-leaves) - Bedrock parity snowy leaves.
- [Axolotl Buckets](https://modrinth.com/mod/axolotl-buckets) - Buckets show age and color of axolotls.
- [Better Clouds](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-clouds)
- [Cool Rain](https://modrinth.com/mod/coolrain) - Cool rain sounds
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) - Connected textures.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) - Shader support.
- [Lamb Dynamic Lights](https://modrinth.com/mod/lambdynamiclights) - Dynamic lighting.
- [Model Gap Fix](https://modrinth.com/mod/modelfix)

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Multiplayer</summary>

- [Custom Lan](https://modrinth.com/mod/custom-lan) - More LAN options.
- [e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc) - Open LAN servers to public.
- [No Chat Reports](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-chat-reports)
- [No Telemetry](https://modrinth.com/mod/no-telemetry)

</details>


<details>
  <summary>Resource Packs</summary>

- [Better Flame Particles](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-flame-particles)
- [Spawned Eggs](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/spawned-eggs) - Better spawned egg textures.
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/) - *see notes
</details>


## Notes
The Vanilla Tweaks resource pack include [several things](https://vanillatweaks.net/share#cy5dCZ). If you do not like it, visit the Vanilla Tweaks website!
